data.name: The Suburbs
data.detailed_description:
This is not a love story.

This is about

Your hot new neighbor's got a secret she'd kill for.

When that stuck up rich bitch moves in across the street, you know something's happening, you just don't know what.

Spy and Sabotage to get your answers... and more!

You'll never know what she's up to if you don't plant a spycam or send a survellence drone to her house... but you also might find out just how far she'll go to protect her dirty secret.

Enough of the sprawling slow-burn storylines... Give us the action!

The Suburbs isn't a slow-burn corruption game, with under an hour to finish the story is fast paced to keep you on the edge of your seat and the UI is simple and easy to use - even with one hand!

The Suburbs is a fast-burn corruption sandbox VN.

data.short_description: More boobs than plot - scheme, spy, and sabotage to uncover the mystery of your large chested neighbor.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 俄文, 簡體中文
data.reviews:
“Models are excellent and the animations are a massive improvement compared with other Sexy Chinaman games. Game is simple and direct, and doesn't pretend to be otherwise. The writing matches the style well.”
★ ★ ★ ★ ★ – Kheledzarumz

“I liked the concept, renders are good, writings is good, not too complicated. Bimbo is awesome, animations are good.”
★ ★ ★ ★ ★ – BlaHard

“One Love Interest who looks like a massive bimbo”
★ ☆ ☆ ☆ ☆ – DIKHammer

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2Ghz +
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
